author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Scorecard Token-Permissions (0→10): declare least-privilege top-level permissions in every GitHub workflow

Every workflow under .github/workflows declares an explicit top-level permissions block (least privilege, job-level elevation only where required, matching the scorecard.yml/security.yml pattern); actionlint + Trivy misconfig green; next Scorecard run reports Token-Permissions 10

message: Scorecard flags GitHub workflow tokens with excessive permissions. Audit ci.yml, nightly.yml, release.yml, auto-release.yml, docs.yml, codeql.yml, codspeed.yml against the least-privilege pattern already used by scorecard.yml/security.yml. Release workflows legitimately need contents:write — declare it explicitly at job level rather than inheriting the permissive default. Agent-executable.
